name: GitHub Issue Triager
description: A plugin-backed agent for triaging GitHub-linked AoA issues, classifying priority and risk, preparing next actions, and drafting GitHub issue updates.

capabilities.description: Classify GitHub-linked AoA issues by type, severity, priority, owner, and next action.
Summarize issue history, comments, reproduction details, and open questions.
Convert clear issues into implementation or investigation plans.
Draft GitHub issue comments, labels, and status updates for configured repositories.
Flag security-sensitive issues and route them for confidential handling when needed.
